testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.name: Upload and Redirect Chain
testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.attack_vector: Upload a malicious file to the server using the upload endpoint and then use the redirect functionality to execute the uploaded file

testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.name: API Redirect Chain
testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.attack_vector: Use the API redirect endpoint to upload and execute a malicious file

testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.name: Debug Page Chain
testphp.vulnweb.com_-7477691251329194392.attack_vector: Use the debug page to gather information and potentially upload and execute a malicious file
